name: rule1_two_scoping_errors
yaml:
version: 1
scoping_dimension: account_id
dimensions:
  - name: account_id
    source: { kind: context, path: account_id }
    scoping: true
  - name: bot_id
    source: { kind: context, path: bot_id }
    scoping: true

name: rule1_one_scoping_mismatched_errors
yaml:
version: 1
scoping_dimension: bot_id
dimensions:
  - name: account_id
    source: { kind: context, path: account_id }
    scoping: true

name: rule2_upper_case_name_errors
yaml:
version: 1
dimensions:
  - name: Account_ID
    source: { kind: context, path: x }

name: rule2_underscore_prefix_errors
yaml:
version: 1
dimensions:
  - name: _x
    source: { kind: context, path: x }

name: rule2_33_char_name_errors
yaml:
version: 1
dimensions:
  - name: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
    source: { kind: context, path: x }

name: rule3_duplicate_cedar_attribute_errors
rule4_missing_dim_prefix_errors
rule4_duplicate_column_errors
rule5_forward_reference_errors
rule5_self_reference_errors
yaml:
version: 1
dimensions:
  - name: a
    source: { kind: derived, template: '${a}' }

name: rule5_two_cycle_errors
rule6_unknown_enrichment_ref_errors
yaml:
version: 1
dimensions:
  - name: x
    source: { kind: enrichment, enrichment_ref: classify_xyz }

  - name: u
    source: { kind: context, path: u }
    pii: hash

name: rule9_pii_tokenize_no_cedar_errors
